meaning: n.[鍖朷寮傛鞍閰哥洂(鎴栭叝)
examples: An aromatic isocyanate is introduced into an IPN coating system to partly substitute the aliphatic isocyanate.
The cathodic electrophoretic coating of epoxy resin was prepared with half blocked isocyanate as curing agent.
Isocyanate curing agents which when heated or reacted with hydroxy functional polymers giving urethane coatings.
